releaseNotes: v0.25.5 — Three changes from field feedback. (1) Label printing no longer fails on bottles scanned from a plain 1D / NDC barcode. RxRescue now prints a plain fallback label — drug name, expiration and lot if known, plus a Code 128 barcode of the scanned code — for any bottle that can't carry a GS1 2D code, and it no longer forces a lot number before printing. (2) The edit-bottle dialog now orders its fields drug name then dose then expiration date. (3) 'Recently scanned' moved to the second sort slot below FEFO, and Settings then Display has a new 'Default sort order' picker so the dashboard opens on your preferred sort. 427 tests passing.
